data.title: Add CONTROL_LOSS breadcrumb emission to sprint/SKILL.md on SKILL_RESUMED absence
data.description: SC1 requires sprint/SKILL.md to instruct the orchestrator to emit a CONTROL_LOSS breadcrumb when SKILL_RESUMED is absent after a Skill tool call. Currently only SKILL_INVOKE and SKILL_RESUMED exist. Add post-invocation check at each call site.
